commands.review_summary:
The branch expands account recovery purge eligibility to auth-locked purged and legacy-deleted users, adds dry-run reason metadata/tests, and tightens one local-auth deletion assertion.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the PR head shows dry-run candidates include the new eligibility reason and auth-account count, while the non-dry-run audit metadata omits both. The spec mismatch is also source-visible in `specs/security-moderation.md`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can add the missing audit metadata, regression coverage, and durable spec note; maintainers still need to approve the destructive production run.
